summary: This is a high-quality test suite that thoroughly covers all functional requirements from the task description. Each pipeline stage (parse, filter, aggregate, format, write, end-to-end) has its own dedicated test class following TDD structure. Coverage is excellent: CSV parsing (all rows, type conversion, field preservation, empty file, missing file), active filtering (mixed, all-inactive, empty input), department stats (headcount, avg salary, total salary, empty input), overall stats (all five fields plus empty input), report formatting (department section, overall section), file writing (file creation, content fidelity), and two integration scenarios plus error handling. Rigor is strong with edge cases like all-inactive employees, empty CSV (header only), missing files, and zero-employee statistics. The TempCSVMixin fixture pattern is clean and reusable, tearDown properly cleans up temp files, tests are independent and well-isolated, and the inline fixture data (SAMPLE_CSV, ALL_INACTIVE_CSV, EMPTY_CSV) are clearly defined at module level. Minor gaps preventing a perfect rigor score: no test for malformed salary values (non-numeric), no test for missing/extra CSV columns, and the end-to-end salary value assertions could be more precise (only checks for the string '8' rather than verifying computed salary figures). Overall this is a trustworthy regression suite.
